author: y4rr
content: Phase 5 V11: async DMA prefetch shipped. Worker stream via new_stream_with_priority(StreamPriority::High); CudaEventWrapper for stream-to-stream sync. AttnLayerStore.prefetch_layer_async issues htod on worker stream and records an event; wait_layer makes the consumer (main) stream wait on it. Inferencer's enable_async_attention method allocates the worker. Forward path: layer L=0 prefetch issued lazily; for layers L>0, prefetch issued during prior layer's MLP compute, waited on at start of L's attention. Llama 3 8B with PAGED_ATTN_BUDGET_MB=1024 PAGED_ATTN_ASYNC=1: cos_sim=1.0, argmax 311=311, 0.42s/forward (sync was 0.37s — overhead from per-event allocation outweighs htod overlap when compute time matches htod time). Real wins manifest when htod >> compute (disk-paged attention reads from L3). 83 tests pass.
